projects.name: Luall
projects.desc: Minimalist interactive shell for Linux, written in C with embedded Lua scripting. Designed for runtime configurability, Luall enables users to redefine core shell behaviors, including prompts, parsing, and command execution, through Lua scripts.

projects.name: LyTop
projects.desc: Extensible system monitor built for Linux terminals. Designed for high customizability via Lua scripting, LyTop combines a C++ core with a fully scriptable Lua-based widget/UI system.
